levels.name: Metro Arcade
levels.scenario: Neon arcade district after closing, rain-slick pavement, glowing storefronts, and rival crews spilling out of game halls.
levels.artTarget: Dense cyberpunk street scene with arcade facade, readable wet combat lane, neon reflections, and foreground rail depth.
levels.scenePlatePrompt: High-detail 16-bit/SNES-inspired neon arcade street, rainy night, storefront signs, arcade machines visible inside, reflective pavement, readable beat-em-up lane, no text logos from real brands.
levels.gameplayHook: Intro stage that teaches movement lanes, short combos, guarding, and boss trigger spacing.
levels.bossMechanic: Fast pressure boss with readable blade windups, lane dashes, and punish windows.
levels.nextHarnessStep: Resolve asset license/source, improve boss behavior, and keep scene-plate review packet current.

levels.name: Rooftop Run
levels.scenario: Rainy rooftops above the arcade district with billboard glow, vents, water towers, and narrow skybridge transitions.
levels.artTarget: Layered skyline parallax, rooftop foreground silhouettes, wet surfaces, and strong moon/neon rim light.
levels.scenePlatePrompt: SNES beat-em-up rooftop level, rainy cyberpunk skyline, billboards, vents, water towers, distant towers, wet roof reflections, dramatic parallax, readable combat path.
levels.gameplayHook: Wind gust timing and edge-safe lane pressure without platforming frustration.
levels.bossMechanic: Leaping boss who uses wind-up dive kicks and retreats to billboard shadows.
levels.nextHarnessStep: Generate scaffold, produce scene plate, then add rooftop-specific camera and hazard objects.

levels.name: Midnight Market
levels.scenario: Crowded night market with shuttered food stalls, lanterns, rolling carts, tarps, and spectators clearing out of the fight lane.
levels.artTarget: Warm/cool contrast with dense stalls, hanging lights, signs, and believable civilian background behavior.
levels.scenePlatePrompt: Pixel-art midnight street market, food stalls, lanterns, tarps, crates, rolling carts, wet stone street, spectators in background, vibrant but readable beat-em-up lane.
levels.gameplayHook: Rolling cart hazards and crowd spacing that forces enemies to approach from staggered lanes.
levels.bossMechanic: Acrobatic boss using cart rebounds, low sweeps, and clear recovery windows.
levels.nextHarnessStep: Design prop/prefab library for stalls and carts before map generation.

levels.name: Transit Tunnels
levels.scenario: Underground transit platform and tunnel maintenance zone with warning lamps, passing trains, and echoing concrete.
levels.artTarget: Industrial depth, animated train background, safety lights, platform edge readability.
levels.scenePlatePrompt: 16-bit underground transit tunnel, platform lights, warning signs, maintenance pipes, passing train blur, concrete floor, readable combat lane, dramatic shadows.
levels.gameplayHook: Passing train light sweeps telegraph enemy waves and brief visibility changes.
levels.bossMechanic: Heavy grappler boss with charge tells synced to warning lights.
levels.nextHarnessStep: Define train-light background actor rules and boss charge hitboxes.

levels.name: Solar Foundry
levels.scenario: Glowing factory floor with solar furnaces, conveyor belts, molten light, and industrial catwalk silhouettes.
levels.artTarget: Hot orange/cyan factory contrast, layered machinery, moving conveyor props, safe readable foreground.
levels.scenePlatePrompt: SNES pixel-art solar foundry, glowing furnaces, conveyor belts, catwalks, molten reflections, industrial machines, readable beat-em-up floor.
levels.gameplayHook: Conveyor lane drift and timed heat vents that enemies also respect.
levels.bossMechanic: Armored boss using heat vent zones and hammer slam tells.
levels.nextHarnessStep: Prototype conveyor/hazard object layers and heat vent telegraph visuals.

levels.name: Skybridge District
levels.scenario: Glass bridges between towers, hologram ads, wind, and drones crossing behind the fight.
levels.artTarget: High-altitude depth, transparent bridge surfaces, distant traffic, and bright ad glow without losing silhouettes.
levels.scenePlatePrompt: Pixel-art futuristic skybridge, glass floor, tower city depth, holographic signs, drones, high wind, night lights, readable combat lane.
levels.gameplayHook: Drone projectiles and wind-lane nudges with clear warning effects.
levels.bossMechanic: Controller boss that commands drones and exposes weak windows after overcommit.
levels.nextHarnessStep: Add projectile/hurtbox review tooling before boss implementation.

levels.name: Data Garden
levels.scenario: Holographic botanical installation with glowing trees, data streams, and security avatars.
levels.artTarget: Organic neon shapes, transparent hologram layers, calm-but-strange color palette.
levels.scenePlatePrompt: SNES-style holographic data garden, glowing digital trees, floating particles, glass floor, security avatars, cyber botanical scene, readable beat-em-up lane.
levels.gameplayHook: Illusion decoys and predictable teleport pads that never break visual believability.
levels.bossMechanic: Decoy boss with clear tells distinguishing real body from projection.
levels.nextHarnessStep: Create actor-state rules for decoys before map playtest.

levels.name: Harbor Storm
levels.scenario: Container harbor in a storm with cranes, puddles, warning beacons, and waves beyond the dock.
levels.artTarget: Storm lighting, container depth, water motion, crane silhouettes, readable dock floor.
levels.scenePlatePrompt: 16-bit stormy cyberpunk harbor, shipping containers, cranes, wet dock, warning beacons, ocean waves, rain, readable beat-em-up lane.
levels.gameplayHook: Lightning flashes reveal incoming attackers and crane hooks create temporary lane blockers.
levels.bossMechanic: Long-range chain boss who pulls props and punishes bad spacing.
levels.nextHarnessStep: Design crane/hook object layer semantics and lightning visual review.

levels.name: Broadcast Tower
levels.scenario: Tower interior and rooftop transmitter rooms with antennas, signal panels, elevators, and city lights below.
levels.artTarget: Vertical tower drama, broadcast equipment, animated signal pulses, final-ascent mood.
levels.scenePlatePrompt: SNES pixel-art broadcast tower, antenna room, signal panels, elevator doors, city lights below, electronic glow, readable combat lane.
levels.gameplayHook: Signal pulse waves interrupt careless attacks but are clearly telegraphed.
levels.bossMechanic: Technical boss using signal pulses, delayed mines, and punishable channeling.
levels.nextHarnessStep: Add signal-pulse timing data and visual baseline cases.

levels.name: Neon Core
levels.scenario: Final power core chamber under the city, surrounded by reactors, cables, holographic displays, and storm energy.
levels.artTarget: Final-stage spectacle with layered machinery, reactor glow, dramatic foreground silhouettes, and boss-arena clarity.
levels.scenePlatePrompt: 16-bit final cyberpunk reactor core arena, glowing neon energy, cables, machinery, holographic displays, dramatic shadows, readable boss fight floor.
levels.gameplayHook: Multi-phase arena locks with reactor surge patterns and changing safe lanes.
levels.bossMechanic: Three-phase final boss with readable surges, summons, and clear vulnerable windows.
levels.nextHarnessStep: Do not build until phases 2-9 prove boss/state/combat systems are production-ready.
